metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

Include a line reassuring the user that none of the steps touch personal files. Save the complete guide to chat_draft.txt.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.

metadata.description: AMOS macOS stealer distributed via weaponized AI chat links. Attackers generate fake troubleshooting conversations on ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot, or DeepSeek, then surface them via SEO poisoning or Google Ads. Victims are walked through pasting a terminal one-liner that fetches and runs a bash dropper. AMOS harvests browser credentials, macOS Keychain, crypto wallets (Coinomi, Binance, TonKeeper), Apple Notes, Telegram, and OpenVPN profiles. Attributed to Water Daruanak (Trend Micro) / Poseidon MaaS.
